name: How often do we need to update our AEO content so answer engines don’t see it as outdated?

mainEntity.name: How often do we need to update our AEO content so answer engines don’t see it as outdated?

acceptedAnswer.text:
You should refresh AEO content every few months, especially for data-heavy, fast-moving topics, so answer engines don’t treat your information as stale. Fresh, accurate answers are more likely to be surfaced and reused.

Static Q&A blocks can slowly lose relevance as user questions and competitive content evolve.

Key factors:
- Topic volatility (fast-changing vs. stable guidance)
- New customer questions emerging from support and sales
- Shifts in AI tools’ answer patterns and prompts
- Outdated statistics, examples, or screenshots

Set a review cadence of 2–3 months for priority questions: update numbers, refine explanations, and expand coverage where gaps appear. Re-validate your schema after major changes.

Treat AEO as a living system; small, regular updates outperform infrequent, large overhauls in keeping your answers prominent.
acceptedAnswer.description: For important topics, review and refresh AEO content every 2–3 months. Update stats and examples, add new questions from customers, and adjust to how AI tools answer queries. Regular, lighter updates keep your Q&A blocks relevant and increase the odds they’ll continue being cited.
